entry.title: New: RES26-060 (Honolulu) — BUD
entry.content:
APPROVING A TELECOMMUNICATIONS FACILITIES LEASE AGREEMENT TO T-MOBILE WEST LLC FOR ITS EXISTING TELECOMMUNICATION FACILITY WITHIN THE HARBOR VILLAGE APARTMENTS, 901 RIVER STREET, HONOLULU, OʻAHU, HAWAIʻI, TMK: (1) 1-7-002:027.

Latest action: Postponed to a date and time to be determined by the Committee Chair.

View on the council site
